items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Simply create an account and browse our course catalog. You can start learning immediately with our free courses.

items.question: Do I get a certificate?
items.answer: Yes! Upon completing a course, you receive a verifiable digital certificate that you can share on your resume or LinkedIn.

items.question: Can I learn at my own pace?
items.answer: Absolutely. All courses are self-paced, so you can learn whenever and wherever works best for you.

defaultProps.title: Ready to Start Learning?
defaultProps.subtitle: Join thousands of students and start your journey today.

defaultProps.title: Contact Us
defaultProps.subtitle: Have a question? We would love to hear from you.

defaultProps.heading: Our platform in numbers
defaultProps.subtitle: A growing community of learners and educators building courses, tracking progress, and earning certificates every day.

items.question: What is the refund policy?
items.answer: We offer a 30-day money back guarantee. If you are not satisfied, request a refund within 30 days of purchase.

items.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: You can cancel at any time from your account settings — your access continues until the end of the current billing period.

items.question: Can I upgrade my plan?
items.answer: Yes. Upgrade any time from your account; the price difference is prorated and the new plan takes effect immediately.
